title: boehmeria cylindrica var. elatior
intro: Boehmeria cylindrica var. elatior, also known as the "Japanese nettle" or "False nettle", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Boehmeria cylindrica var. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and digestive issues. Boehmeria cylindrica var. elatior can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine in Asia, particularly in China and Japan.
